name: JAGUAR HEALTH  DL-,0001
summary: Jaguar Health, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing gastrointestinal products for humans and animals. Their lead product is Mytesi, an oral medication approved for the symptomatic relief of noninfectious diarrhea in adults with HIV/AIDS on antiretroviral therapy. TICKER: Jaguar Health, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing gastrointestinal products for humans and animals, with Mytesi as their lead product for diarrhea relief in adults with HIV/AIDS.
